tasks.name: Create about page and fix footer link

tasks.name: create-careers-page
tasks.summary: Created careers page at /careers with 6 sample job listings. Added jobs data file and updated Footer link. Includes department, type, location info and apply buttons with mailto links.

tasks.name: Create blog page
tasks.summary: Created blog listing page at /blog with 6 sample posts, added Blog links to navigation and footer, implemented responsive grid layout with dark mode support

tasks.name: create-faq-page
tasks.summary: Created FAQ page at /faq with 8 questions covering shipping, returns, payments, and order management. Implemented accordion-style interface with expand/collapse functionality, dark mode support, and updated footer link.
